tool.name: PanSN rename FASTA
tool.description: Prefix FASTA headers with PanSN spec (SAMPLE#HAP#CONTIG)
tool.command: #set $delim_map = {'hash': '#', 'pipe': '|', 'underscore': '_', 'dot': '.'} #set $delim_char = $delim_map[str($delimiter)] #import re #if str($sample).strip() #set $sample_value = str($sample).strip() #else #set $sample_value = re.sub(r'[^A-Za-z0-9_.\-]', '_', str($input.element_identifier)) #end if python '$__tool_directory__/pansn_rename.py' --input '$input' --sample '$sample_value' --haplotype $haplotype --delimiter '$delim_char' $gzip_output #if str($gzip_output) == "--gzip-output" --output '$output_gz' #else --output '$output' #end if

param.label: Input FASTA
param.help: One assembly, contig-per-record. Plain FASTA or gzipped.

param.label: Sample name (blank = use input element identifier)
param.help: Strain / sample identifier. Letters, digits, underscore, hyphen, dot. Leave blank to auto-derive from the input dataset's element identifier (useful when mapping over a collection in a workflow).

validator.message: Letters, digits, underscore, hyphen, dot only

param.label: Haplotype number
param.help: Per PanSN spec: use 1 for haploid / single-haplotype assemblies; use 1,2 for diploid; etc.

param.label: PanSN delimiter
param.help: Single character separating sample / haplotype / contig in the new header. Match the value passed to pggb's -Y flag.

tool.help:
**PanSN rename FASTA**
Rewrites every FASTA header to follow the [PanSN spec](https://github.com/pangenome/PanSN-spec):
>chr1 -> >SAMPLE#HAP#chr1 >chr2 contig length=14000 -> >SAMPLE#HAP#chr2 contig length=14000
PanSN-named FASTAs are required by `pggb`, `wfmash`, and `odgi` when multiple haplotypes share a contig name (e.g. every strain has a "chr1"). The `SAMPLE` prefix disambiguates haplotypes; the `HAP` slot supports diploid/polyploid panels.
-----
**Inputs**
- `Input FASTA` — uncompressed `.fasta` or gzipped `.fasta.gz`. Description lines after the contig name (e.g. `>chr1 length=...`) are preserved. - `Sample name` — strain / sample identifier; letters, digits, underscore, hyphen, dot only. - `Haplotype number` — integer (default 1). - `PanSN delimiter` — single character (default `#`).
**Outputs**
- Renamed FASTA, optionally bgzip-compatible gzipped.
-----
**Use in a pangenome workflow**
Map this tool over a collection of one-FASTA-per-strain, then merge with `fasta-merge` and pass to `pggb` with matching `-Y` delimiter.
